name: muppets
description: The Muppet Show over the Clue chassis. Kermit, Piggy, Fozzie, Gonzo. It ain't easy being green.

room_map.name: build_kermits_office
room_map.function: Active work, direction, the show must go on

room_map.name: think_props_department
room_map.function: Research, references, the archive of bits

room_map.name: priv_broom_closet
room_map.function: Private deliberation, things not ready for the stage

room_map.name: pitch_the_stage
room_map.function: External relations, performance, the big number

characters.role: CRO — creative director, holds it together, it ain't easy
CEO — executive authority, diva energy, karate chop
CTO — earnest implementation, wocka wocka, tries his best
COO — eccentric operations, whatever works, probably fine
CMO — stage manager, logistics, external comms, go-fer
CSO — commentary from the balcony, context, institutional memory
